title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 12: The Yoga of Devotion
description: Chapter 12 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna describes the qualities of the ideal devotee: free from hatred, compassionate, without ego.
introduction: Chapter 12 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna describes the qualities of the ideal devotee: free from hatred, compassionate, without ego.

translation.text: One who has no hatred toward any being, who is friendly and compassionate — such a one is dear to me.
